rationale: One exact official MTA Q52 row binds the realized August 31, 2025 service change to the reviewed existing Q52 canonical identity. The row is an exact two-member bundle: the Edgemere extension is a service-pattern treatment and the location-specific mandatory OMNY fare-payment rule is a fare-collection treatment; navigation and timetable text are context only. Current operational coverage fingerprint a2b0d762efe862ad9b14d77481cdfd7e9267d911c5b96a16fd390fda10745ce6 pins immutable route-anchor release v1-rc8 at SHA-256 874d2233713d624e127f6f690a42088ee9473873fb8ebff3d8f21cfb88916dc4, where Q52+ uniquely anchors as a true route to route_q52-sbs-queens. Q53+ remains independently anchored as a true route to route_q53-sbs-ace, and no clause creates a Q53 edge.

clauses.label: Q52 Edgemere extension
clauses.source_quote: The Q52 will be extended further east to Beach 50 St in Edgemere.
clauses.description: Q52 was extended farther east to Beach 50 St in Edgemere.

clauses.label: Q52 OMNY-only fare payment
clauses.source_quote: You must use OMNY to pay your fare if you board at Beach Channel Dr and Beach 51 St.
clauses.description: OMNY fare payment was required for Q52 boarding at Beach Channel Dr and Beach 51 St.
clauses.location_text: Beach Channel Dr and Beach 51 St

clauses.source_quote: Get more details on Q52 service.
clauses.review_rationale: Navigation text; no additional treatment or route edge.
Timetable navigation; no additional treatment or route edge.
